medical_history.chief_complaint: fever of 38°C, night sweats, and fatigue for several days
medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Systemic lymphadenopathy, diagnosed with stage IVB DLBCL, treated with R-CHOP, re-diagnosed with double-hit lymphoma (DHL), started on R-CODOX-M/IVAC, experienced hepatobiliary enzyme elevation after chemotherapy cycles
medical_history.past_medical_history: Autoimmune hemolytic anemia, previously underwent splenectomy with red blood cell transfusion

physical_examination.general_examination: Body weight gain (+2 kg/week), jaundice, lower leg edema, abdominal distention
physical_examination.specialty_examination: Hepatomegaly, mild ascites on the surface of the liver, geographic low density area at the posterior segment of the liver on CT
